title: Senior Software Engineer - BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!
